# Fri, 26 Apr 2024 02:39:48 GMT
USER lightstreamer
# Fri, 26 Apr 2024 02:39:49 GMT
EXPOSE 8080
# Fri, 26 Apr 2024 02:39:49 GMT
WORKDIR /lightstreamer/bin/unix-like

CMD ["./LS.sh" "run"]
